ApiBaseUrl.Name: API Base URL
ApiBaseUrl.Hint: Base URL of an OpenAI-compatible API. DeepSeek: https://api.deepseek.com/v1 — OpenAI: https://api.openai.com/v1 — OpenRouter: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1 — Ollama (local): http://localhost:11434/v1

ApiKey.Name: API Key
ApiKey.Hint: Your API key for the provider above. Stored in this world's settings and visible to other GMs of this world.

Model.Name: Model
Model.Hint: Model identifier, e.g. deepseek-chat, deepseek-reasoner, gpt-4o, or any model your provider offers.

Temperature.Name: Creativity (temperature)
Temperature.Hint: Higher values give more creative (and less predictable) concepts.

MaxTokens.Name: Max response tokens
MaxTokens.Hint: Upper limit for the AI response length. Raise this if complex creatures come back truncated.

Generator.Title: AI Creature Forge
Generator.PromptPlaceholder: e.g. A cunning swamp hag who brews poisons from drowned travelers, served by a swarm of leeches...
Generator.NoApiKey: No API key is configured. Set one in Module Settings → SimplyPF2e before generating.

Sources.MenuHint: Choose which compendium packs the Creature Forge draws abilities, spells, feats, and equipment from.
Sources.Title: Compendium Sources
Sources.Hint: The Forge scanned this world's Item compendiums. Check the packs each category may draw from — homebrew and module packs work too. Leaving a category empty uses the PF2e system defaults.
Sources.NonePacksFound: No compendium packs with matching content were found in this world.
Sources.ResetDone: Compendium sources reset to the PF2e system defaults.

Preview.FromCompendium: Pulled from the PF2e bestiary ability glossary
Preview.NotFound: No compendium match found — this entry will be skipped

Errors.NoBaseUrl: No API base URL is configured in the module settings.
Errors.ApiError: The AI provider returned an error ({status}): {detail}
Errors.NetworkError: Could not reach the AI provider: {message}. If you are using a local or self-hosted provider, make sure it allows requests from Foundry (CORS).
Errors.EmptyResponse: The AI provider returned an empty response.
Errors.BadJson: The AI response was not valid JSON. Try generating again.
Errors.WrongSystem: SimplyPF2e requires the Pathfinder Second Edition (pf2e) game system.
